p.seg: Christian, by the grace of God bishop of Candida Casa [Whithorn], to all sons of the most holy Mother Church, clerk and lay, present and future, Greeting:

You should all be notified that I have granted, and by this my charter have made firm, to God and to the church of Holyrood in Edinburgh, and to the canons serving God there, the church of St Mary and St Bruoc of Dunrod, in free and perpetual alms with all its revenues and pertinents, reserving episcopal right, and the church of Twynholm, with all its revenues and pertinents. I also confirm by this same charter the donation of Fergus and his son Uhtred of the whole toun of Dunrod by its correct bounds, with all its rightful pertinents and revenues, and as their own charters the better and more fully bear witness.

As witness, William abbot of Dundrennan, John the archdeacon, Gilbert the chaplain, James the parson of Troqueer, Robert the priest, son of Dolfin, Mac Raith of Spittal, Máel Bethad the bishop’s nephew, Walter his brother, Nicholas [and] James the bishop’s nephews, William of Cartmel, Gilbert the bishop’s steward, Bran son of Macgillegunnin, Arnold the doorward, Adam de Ele.
